usage: Use this as the canonical logo reference for all course visuals. Do not redraw from memory.

typography.style: thin geometric sans / premium wide tracking
typography.note: Do not use bold, condensed, handwritten, serif or decorative fonts for the logo. If the exact original font is unavailable, keep thin geometric sans, wide tracking, centered layout.

layout.safe_area: logo group centered, large empty dark field around it
layout.divider: short centered gold line below main title
layout.minimal_clear_space: at least one main-letter height around logo group

rules: Use the logo reference file for course identity consistency.
Never replace the logo with another Pro Options mark unless the user provides it.
Do not change the split: ПРО is white, ОПЦИОНЫ is gold.
Do not change subtitle text: для начинающих.
Do not add icons, candles, rockets, money, arrows or extra text inside the logo group.
Do not use red in the logo.
Do not stretch horizontally or vertically.
Do not place on noisy backgrounds without dark overlay.
